tasks.label: compile-wePadel
args: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force target/classes | Out-Null; $f = Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Filter *.java src/main/java | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }; & 'C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17.0.1\bin\javac.exe' -encoding UTF-8 -d target/classes @f; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
